texto: I find myself thinking about this hue-mon all of the time. I wonder if it ever thought about us?Was there room in here for thoughts about beetles?Did it ever wonder how some glow?Or spray liquid fire?Or dance on water?Or drink fog?Maybe someday, if a hue-mon reads this journal, it will help them appreciate all of the amazing little aliens living underfoot.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jay Hosler que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I find myself thinking about this hue-mon all of the time. I wonder if it ever thought about us?W…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, beetles, bugs, com foco em bugs e humans.
